prompt: Set up agent-pulse hooks in my Claude Code project so I can see what tools the agent is using, and also set up a /loop to alert me if anything goes stale

assertions.name: includes_hook_commands
assertions.description: Provides the agent-pulse hook claude-code commands

assertions.name: includes_loop_command
assertions.description: Provides a /loop command for monitoring stale runs

assertions.name: covers_session_tracking
assertions.description: Mentions SessionStart or SessionEnd for session-level tracking
